text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Parenting & Childcare > Baby Clothing 35 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter No Filter ALLCARE HEALTH ALLCARE HEALTH BROOKINGS OFFICE BABE STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF It is a rewards program where patients earn vouchers for healthy choices made, such as participating in classes and programs. Vouchers can be use at any of the Babe Stores to get items such as: baby clothing, blankets, sleepers, diapers, wipes, baby wash, infant bathtubs, washcloths, breast pads, nursing covers, nursing pillows, potty chairs, sippy cups, safetly latches and outlet protectors, and more. Eligibility: -Must be an AllCare CCO member to participate -Pregnant women and babies 0-3 years old Hours: Tuesday 12:30pm-4:30pm (541) 471-4106 Visit Website More Details BAMBINOS OREGON NEW BABY GIFTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a new baby gift basket that includes a handmade quilt or crocheted blanket, laundry detergent, diaper cream, baby shampoo, a baby outfit, diapers, wipes, a Bambino's tote, and other useful items. Specific items are based on current availability. 322 Main Street Suite 200 Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: -Low-income expectant mothers 32 weeks or further along with limited outside support -Age 0-3 months: Must meet all other program requirements Hours: Monday/Thursday 9am-noon, Tuesday 12pm-6pm, 1st and 3rd Saturday 1pm-4pm Email (503) 623-4618 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BIRTHRIGHT OF HILLSBORO PREGNANCY AND PARENTING SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A faith-based agency that provides information, support, and referrals to those experiencing unplanned pregnancies. Services include pregnancy testing, pro-life counseling, maternity and infant clothes, diapers, and other infant care needs. Does not recommend or refer to abortion services. 232 NE Lincoln Street Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Expectant families and new parents Hours: Tuesday 11am-6pm, Wednesday-Friday 11am-2pm, other times available by appointment Email (503) 648-6766 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BIRTHRIGHT OF SALEM PREGNANCY AND PARENT SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A faith-based organization that provides information and referrals to those experiencing unplanned pregnancies. Services include pregnancy testing, pro-life counseling, parenting support, parenting classes, and community referrals. Does not recommend or refer to abortion services. 1880 Lancaster Drive NE Suite 124 Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Expectant families and new parents Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 10am-1pm, Wednesday 10am-4pm Email (503) 585-2273 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BUILDING HEALTHY FAMILIES BABY RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provide material goods such as baby diapers, wipes, formula, children clothing from new born to age 8. 207 NE Park Street Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Families Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-4pm Email (541) 426-9411 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BUILDING HEALTHY FAMILIES BUILDING HEALTHY FAMILIES EASTERN OREGON BABY RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provide material goods such as baby diapers, wipes, formula, children clothing from new born to age 8. 2725 7th Street Room 002 Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Families Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-4pm (541) 524-2331 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY SHARING PROGRAM BABY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides diapers and formula. Also offers access to used clothing, depending on availability. 1440 Birch Avenue Cottage Grove, OR 97424 Eligibility: Residents who self-identify as low income Hours: Monday 1:30pm-6pm, Tuesday-Friday 11am-3:30pm Email (541) 942-2176 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DALLAS EVANGELICAL CHURCH COMMUNITY CLOTHING CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, towels and linens. Donations accepted. 783 SW Church Street Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Wednesday 9am-noon, Thursday 7pm-9pm, Friday-Saturday 9am-noon, as long as approved volunteer leaders are available Email (503) 623-3778 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FAMILY NURTURING CENTER FAMILY NURTURING CENTER JACKSON COUNTY LITTLE SPROUTS CLOTHING SWAP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides items such as childrens clothing sizes 0-8, diapers, wipes, toys, car seats, stroller, and food, depending on availabilty. 825 E Main Street Suite A Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm, Friday 9am-noon Email (541) 779-5242 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HELPING HANDS RESOURCES HELPING HANDS RESOURCES CLOTHING ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, shoes, bedding, household items, and clothing for babies and newborns. Items are subject to availability. 1755 13th Street SE Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Thursday/Saturday 9am-noon, closed holidays Email (503) 364-9936 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOPE CHURCH BABY BOUTIQUE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides diapers, wipes, infant and toddler clothing (size 2T and under), and baby equipment. 2835 Santiam Highway SE Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday 2:30pm-4:30pm, Wednesday 10am-noon Email (541) 967-4673 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HOPE PREGNANCY CENTER PREGNANCY AND PARENT SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A faith-based agency that provides information and referrals to those who are experiencing unplanned pregnancies. Services include pro-life counseling, pregnancy testing, limited obstetrical ultrasound, parenting support, limited STI testing and community referrals. Does not provide referrals for abortion services or birth control. Clients who participate in the classes are eligible to receive maternity and infant clothes, diapers, and other infant care needs. 17 SW 6th Street Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Medical services: Monday/Thursday 10am-5pm, Wednesday 1pm-5pm Education day only, no medical services offered: Tuesday noon-5pm Email (541) 889-4272 Get Directions Visit Website More Details INSIGHTS YOUNG PARENT SERVICES PARENTING RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a resource closet of baby clothing and toys for enrolled program participants. 4900 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Parents age 22 and younger Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm (503) 239-6996 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF BENTON COUNTY GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides children's clothing, personal hygiene items, linens (bedding, towels, etc.), baby bundles (newborn baby supplies and clothing), kitchen supplies, and a gift closet (for when community members can't afford to purchase gifts for special occasions). 4900 NW Hwy 99 Suite 102 Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Low-income community members in need Hours: Helpline: Monday-Thursday 9:30am-1:30pm Email (541) 757-8111 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY GAP RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides furniture, kitchen items, firewood, medical equipment, personal hygiene supplies, cleaning supplies, and bedding/linens. Accepts donations of similar items. Assistance depends on availability. Follow-ups may be provided once the need is met. Eligibility: Low-income households (self-declared or referred and verified by caseworker, employer, or landlord) Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 650-0153 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST A FAMILY PLACE MCMINNVILLE CLOTHING AND DIAPER BANK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides children's clothing, maternity clothing, and emergency diapers. Families can receive a 3-day supply of diapers once a month when supplies are available. 125 SE Cowls Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Families in need of diapers and clothing for children ages 0-5, or those who need maternity clothing Hours: Thursday 10am-noon Email (503) 472-4020 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST A FAMILY PLACE NEWBERG CLOTHING AND DIAPER BANK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides children's clothing, maternity clothing, and emergency diapers. Families can receive a 3-day supply of diapers once a month when supplies are available. 600 E 6th Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Diapers and children's clothing: Families with children ages 0-5 Maternity clothing: Unrestricted Hours: Thursday 10am-noon Email (503) 472-4020 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST A FAMILY PLACE WILLAMINA CLOTHING AND DIAPER BANK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides children's clothing, maternity clothing, and emergency diapers. Families can receive a 3-day supply of diapers once a month when supplies are available. 1100 NE Oaken Hills Drive Willamina, OR 97396 Eligibility: Families with minor children ages 0-5 Hours: Thursday 10am-noon Email (503) 472-4020 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MARLA'S MALL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a thrift store with books, toys, household items, new hygiene products, knick-knacks, and clothing including interview or work-appropriate attire. Offers volunteer work experience and credit recovery for students working at the store. Also accepts donations of new and gently used items. 2500 E Street Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Thrift Store: Unrestricted Volunteers: Baker School District high school students Hours: School year: Monday-Thursday 8am-11am and 1pm-4pm, closed holidays. Hours are subject to change. Summer hours: June 16th-July 17th Monday-Thursday 8:30am-12:30pm Email (541) 524-2309 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MOTHER & CHILD EDUCATION CENTER CLOTHING AND BABY SUPPLIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides maternity clothing and supplies for pregnant women and nursing mothers. Also provides baby clothing, baby blankets, sleepers, toys and children's books, as well as emergency supplies of diapers, formula, and baby food. Strollers, infant bathtubs, car seats, and pack and plays available dependent on availability. Parents are encouraged to become a client (which is free) and allows access to more services. Diapers and formula are available for emergency needs only and not provided on an ongoing basis. Mother & Child is not a clothing closet; it is a program which has supplies to assist families but also focuses on education and support. 1515 NE 41st Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Pregnant or parents/primary caregivers of a child aged birth to 5 years old. No eligibility requirements based on income. The client must be able to come to the Mother and Child Education Center to receive services. Diapers, clothing, and other goods cannot be mailed or delivered to clients. Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-4pm, Friday 10am-2pm Email (503) 249-5801 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEXT DOOR CLOTHING AND TOYS CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers children's clothing, toys and supplies. 965 Tucker Road Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Open to any families that would like to either donate or take gently used baby clothing, toys, and baby equipment. Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 10 am-12pm and 1-3pm Email (541) 386-6665 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEXT DOOR NEXT DOOR WASCO CLOTHING AND TOYS CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers children's clothing, toys and supplies. 1113 Kelly Avenue The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Open to any families that would like to either donate or take gently used baby clothing, toys, and baby equipment. Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 10 am-12pm and 1-3pm Email (541) 296-8118 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PREGNANCY AND PARENTING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A faith-based agency that provides pregnancy tests and pregnancy options information. Services include prenatal, parenting, and life skills education and support, maternity clothing, baby clothing, toddler clothing, and diapers. Offers a weekly parent/child playgroup, and monthly parent lunch group. Provides miscarriage support, support after abortion, and connections to local resources. Does not provide referrals to abortion services. 475 Laurel Street Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-4pm, 4pm-7pm by appointment only Email (541) 902-2273 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PREGNANCY CENTER PREGNANCY SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A faith-based organization that provides information and referrals to those experiencing unplanned pregnancies. Services include pregnancy testing, pro-life counseling, early obstetrical ultrasounds, STI testing, parenting & life skills education and support groups through baby's first birthday. Offers parenting groups and classes for parents to participate in and be able to receive baby items, Earn While You Earn and New Mom's Club. Does not recommend or refer to abortion services. 2019 Aero Way #103 Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Families who think they may be pregnant, and families who are either pregnant or parenting a newborn. You do not have to participate in classes to be eligible to receive maternity and infant clothes, diapers, and other infant care needs.
